title: Evidence
description: Schema for Evidence in Nuix ECC REST API

destination.description: destination where evidence is to be saved

credentials.description: Set to `true` if credentials are supplied to access the destination

createFileSafe.description: Set to `true` to create a FileSafe, `false` save native copies of the files

compression.description: Compression setting for saved data.  One of `None`, `Medium`, `High` (used only if createFileSafe = `true`)

segmentSize.description: size of each FileSafe segment (used only if createFileSafe = `true`)

segmentSizeUnit.description: unit of measure which applies to segmentSize.  One of `KB`, `MB`, or `GB` (used only if createFileSafe = `true`)

overwrite.description: whether to overwrite existing files at the destination (used only if createFileSafe = `false`)

maintainFullPath.description: whether to maintain the full path of the file at the destination (used only if createFieSafe = false)

validateCollection.description: whether to validate the entire FileSafe after collection is completed
